title: C.I.M.I.H.
description: Customize first-person item position, rotation, scale and swing animations.
body:
# C.I.M.I.H.

Custom Item Model In Hands is a client-side Fabric mod that allows you to fully customize how items look in first person.

## Features

* Change item position
* Change item rotation
* Change item scale
* Multiple swing animation modes
* Adjustable swing speed
* Ignore Haste effect option
* Live in-game configuration menu
* Setting code system for sharing configs
* Works on multiplayer servers
* Client-side only

## Supported Versions

* 1.21.7
* 1.21.8
* 1.21.11

## Loader

* Fabric

## Notes

This mod only changes first-person rendering on the client and does not require installation on servers.
